Is it based on investment or smth
Hmm, probably because of investment and such, I guess.
Not sure how do I answer that, sorry :v
All good
So what's the best team?
Hmm… may I ask what characters do you have in the game?
Uhh...
I haven't played yet :/
Oh… you can get a SSR character for free if you log in 3-7 days.
No, as in… if you log in 3 days, you get a special item in which you can pick any SSR character.
Same applies when you log in for 7 days.
Logging in the game to get these items doesn’t have to be consecutive.
So, yeah. Spend your time wisely.
it is rating teams
Oh
Makes more sense
white for Yellow, Red for red, purple for purple, blue for blue
Is there like a beginner guide in this game?
Like a vid or smth
If there is probably not in english
Yeah, Morimens doesn’t really have video guides in English if there are any of those.
If there is, it may be in Mandarin.
Can u give me like a tldr of what to do as a beginner?

Okay, so… there are different types of cards with different actions. Drag the ones that can make your team attack enemies, shield characters, give the enemines debuffs, heal the whole team, etc.
One of the main characters also has an alter.
dont trust it, it's a **TEAM** tierlist that's subjectively built
you build you
you use you
I said it before and now I will say it again: play a team that people put on tierlist for you is just LAME

Level>weapon>skills or smth ?

Focus on 1 team of 4

A public doc would still be great as the realms and stuff can be hard to understand if you go through multiple layers of iffy translations
Yeah, you’re actually right. I don’t really know if there’s a Morimens Fandom wiki, but when there’s an official English version of this game, I can contribute too.
I think it’s kinda okay if I post the Google Docs file since I don’t think there’s a wiki for the game anywhere. So, here it is.
https://docs.google.com/document/d/12Gec5M-WqynpidR8L1uueNRqr7MWkCpDpncRiO_uAyU/edit
